description:
Tag every FnIr with its origin at lowering time. No consumers yet — just the field.

## Shape

```rust
enum FnCategory {
    User,              // parsed from user source
    Prelude,           // runtime.fz builtins
    MultiClauseCont,   // fn_clause_N
    LambdaLift,        // lambda_N from closure lifting
    CpsCont,           // k_N, k_receive_N
    ControlFlowCont,   // if_then/if_else/case_clause_N/cond_arm_N/with_else_N
}

struct FnIr {
    // ...existing fields...
    category: FnCategory,
}
```

## Recording sites

Set the category at every place a FnIr is added to the module:
- User: src/ir_lower.rs:500-520 (user items after prelude)
- Prelude: src/ir_lower.rs:457-498 (runtime.fz items)
- MultiClauseCont: src/ir_lower.rs:1707 (`mint_cont_fn(..., "fn_clause_{i}")`)
- LambdaLift: src/ir_lower.rs:2259 (`FnBuilder::new(lam_id, format!("lambda_{}", ...))`)
- CpsCont: src/ir_lower.rs:2327, 2383, 2440 (`k_{}`/`k_receive_{}`)
- ControlFlowCont: src/ir_lower.rs:2179-2184, 2932, 2981, 3045 (if/case/cond)

## Verify

- No behavior change. No consumer reads `category` yet. Just the field landing cleanly.
- `prelude_fn_id_cutoff` can stay for now; .8 will consider removing it once `category == Prelude` subsumes its only use.

## Independent

No dependencies. Can land in parallel with Arc 1 and .4.
title: fz-RS.5 — FnIr.category: FnCategory field, set at lowering
